pr.title: fix(auth): Google SSO production callback domain (emberplay.app)
pr.rollback: Revert PR. Remove NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL from Vercel Production if reverting behavior.

receipt.goal: Production OAuth/magic-link redirectTo uses https://emberplay.app/auth/callback via NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL; localhost uses window origin always.
commands_run: git checkout main; git pull origin main
cd web && pnpm install && pnpm run build
decisions: Google Cloud redirect URI stays Supabase /auth/v1/callback per standard Supabase Google flow.
NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL only affects non-localhost hosts; localhost/127.0.0.1 always use browser origin.
qa_steps: Vercel Production: set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://emberplay.app and Supabase redirect allowlist.
Sign in with Google from emberplay.app after deploy.
Local: Google/magic link still uses localhost:3000/auth/callback without setting SITE_URL.
receipt.rollback: Git revert branch; unset NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL on Vercel Production.
